case_title: LE THU LU VS. BRYNE ELISE ULMSCHNEIDER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF LE THU LU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRYNE ELISE ULMSCHNEIDER IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: C. CHENG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LU, LE THU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ULMSCHNEIDER, BRYNE ELISE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LU, LE THU AS TO DEFENDANT ULMSCHNEIDER, BRYNE ELISE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2024 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY LU, LE THU AS TO DEFENDANT ULMSCHNEIDER, BRYNE ELISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-21-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED**
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-23-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
